project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 17 Next.js 15 apps, 90+ shared packages
build_system: pnpm 10 workspaces + Turborepo 2. Tasks: build, typecheck, lint, test. turbo.json defines pipeline with ^build dependencies for typecheck/test.
test_framework: vitest with React Testing Library. Tests in src/__tests__/ or colocated.
verification_instructions: Run pnpm --filter @quant/<app> typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/<app> lint for each app before PR.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already done in monorepo root)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. No Docker needed for validation. Must NOT touch packages/brand, packages/shared-ui, CI config, or other apps.
contribution_requirements: One PR per app. Verify typecheck+lint pass before each PR. Do not modify shared packages internals.

key_patterns.frontend_patterns: Next.js App Router with 'use client' components. Uses @quant/shared-ui components (AppShell, Sidebar, Button, Card, PageTransition, FadeIn, LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, Dialog, etc.). React Query via @tanstack/react-query for data fetching. framer-motion for animations.
key_patterns.api_pattern: Next.js API routes in src/app/api/ that proxy to backend (Fastify) at BACKEND_URL env var. Frontend hooks call /api/ routes which forward to backend.
key_patterns.brand_integration: Import from @quant/brand: motion (spring, easing, duration), colors, typography, themes, app configs (quantcalendar, quantdocs, etc.), icons. QuantAds already has @quant/brand in tsconfig paths. Others need it added.
key_patterns.state_management: React Query for server state. Local state with useState/useReducer. No global state library.
key_patterns.styling: Tailwind CSS with CSS custom properties (--quant-* vars). Dark mode via .dark class on html. globals.css already defines light/dark vars. Brand colors mapped to CSS vars.
key_patterns.backend_pattern: Fastify 5 via @quant/server-core createApp(). Routes registered with prefix. Services handle business logic. QuantMeet uses LiveKit SDK (livekit-server-sdk). QuantDocs uses Yjs for real-time collaboration.
key_patterns.existing_hooks: useEvents, useCalendars (quantcalendar), useDocument, useDocuments (quantdocs), useFiles, useStorageQuota (quantdrive), useMeeting, useParticipants (quantmeet), useCampaign, useAnalytics (quantads). All use React Query or manual fetch.

directory_structure: Each target app: src/ (app/, components/, hooks/, providers/), backend/ (app.ts, routes/, services/, __tests__/). packages/brand/src/ has motion.ts, apps.ts, themes.ts, colors.ts, typography.ts, icons/, logos/. packages/api-client/src/ has core/, endpoints/, hooks/. packages/shared-ui/src/ has components/, hooks/, themes/.
